title: hirculus serpyllifolius
intro: Hirculus serpyllifolius, also known as the mouse-ear chickweed, is a perennial herb belonging to the carnation family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Hirculus serpyllifolius include soothing skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing swelling and promoting wound healing. Hirculus serpyllifolius can be prepared as a tea, ointment, or salve for topical use, and is also used in herbal infusions to support overall skin health.
